title: sorghastrum incompletum var. africanum
intro: Sorghastrum incompletum var. africanum, also known as African beard grass, is a type of perennial grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional African medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of African beard grass include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of African beard grass can be made by infusing the leaves and roots in water or oil, and it is also used in traditional remedies such as teas, tinctures, and ointments.
